actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_to_Get_Content_Documents
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed to Get Content Documents

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_Patient_Agreements_No_Documents_Found
actionCalls.label: Log - Get Patient Agreements - No Documents Found

value.stringValue: No Documents Found for this Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_Patient_Agreements_No_Signed_Documents_Found
actionCalls.label: Log - Get Patient Agreements - No Signed Documents Found

value.stringValue: No Signed Documents Found for this Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Submit_Documents_is_Not_Supported
actionCalls.label: Log - Submit Documents is Not Supported

actionCalls.name: Log_Success_for_Get_Content_Document
actionCalls.label: Log - Success for Get Content Document

actionCalls.name: Log_Success_for_Get_Content_Documents_Links
actionCalls.label: Log - Success for Get Content Documents Links

value.stringValue: Content Document links are fetched successfully

actionCalls.name: Log_User_input_in_Select_patient_Agreement_Screen
actionCalls.label: Log - User input in Select patient Agreement Screen

assignments.name: Add_to_Content_Document_Id_Text_Collection
assignments.label: Add to Content Document Id Text Collection

assignments.description: Since SF doesn't have a way to see if a collection has records or not we need to count.
assignments.name: Count_Patient_Agreements
assignments.label: Count Patient Agreements

assignments.name: Set_Log_message_for_User_Input_in_Select_Patient_Agreement_Record
assignments.label: Set Log message for User Input in Select Patient Agreement Record

value.stringValue: Selected the following Patient Agreement in Patient Agreements on Opportunity Table

assignments.name: Set_Log_message_for_User_Input_in_Show_content_documents
assignments.label: Set Log message for User Input in Show content documents

value.stringValue: Selected the following Content Document in the Documents on Patient Agreement table -

decisions.description: Here we check if there was documents found or not. If there was then we can continue. if not we need to stop.
decisions.name: Are_there_signed_documents
decisions.label: Are there signed documents

decisions.description: Not all labs support submitting documents the order, which we will give an error when this happens.
decisions.name: Does_Lab_Support_API_Submit_Documents
decisions.label: Does Lab Support API - Submit Documents

Flow.description: This will allow users to submit documents to the lab provider
Flow.label: Screenflow - Lab Order - Submit Documents

recordLookups.name: Get_Patient_Agreement_Records_For_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Patient Agreement Records For Opportunity

fields.name: txt_ApiError
fields.fieldText:
Woops, looks like we ran into a problem uploading the document to the lab. Please submit a help desk ticket with this information and the link to the lab order.


Error Message:

{!Upload_GT_Document.results.errorMessage}

fields.name: txt_FaultMessage
fields.fieldText:
Woops, looks like we ran into a problem uploading the document to the lab. Please submit a help desk ticket with this information and the link to the lab order.


Error Message:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: txt_ErrorEndpointNotSupported
fields.fieldText: {!recordId.Lab_Provider__c} doesn't support uploading documents for this order.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_txt_NoDocumentsFound
fields.fieldText: Action Needed: Ensure that the necessary Patient Agreements are created and linked to the Opportunity.

fields.name: txt_NoDocumentsFound
fields.fieldText: Action Needed: Please reach out to the patient to ensure the Patient Agreement is signed.
